text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I happen to pass by the dorm after training.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, it's getting late. Where are you, my dear
ponies?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They're certainly not the sort to forgo the rules. I
do hope nothing bad has happened.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Aha, what impeccable timing!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sorry for breaking curfew!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: We're so, sooo sorry, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back. I would have never expected the
two of you to return late.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Pray tell your reasons for this?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well, you see... Spe and I were out on a long jog.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We were running by the station when we came
across a lost Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We tried to talk to her, but that didn't work! See,
'cause...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She was an Umamusume from Dubai!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: From Dubai, you say?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We managed to get through to her using simple
words and gestures. Turns out, she was looking
for her host family's house!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Once we escorted her back home, they invited us
to her welcome party. We ate these giant kebabs,
and—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Kebabs, you say?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then a dance party broke out! We all did some
belly dancing together!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Good gracious! Belly dancing?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We completely lost track of time... We're really,
really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's not the most believable story, but we are
telling the truth...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, of course. That is clear as day. The two of
you would never lie to me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's precisely because I know it all must be true
that I laughed. What a day you've had!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I imagine the young Umamusume from Dubai is
most relieved. Well done, Suzuka and Spe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Here I was worrying over what kind of trouble
might have befallen you two.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I am truly relieved that you two are safe. Be sure
to inform me of any future late returns.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Please, do not make my heart ache with worry,
my dear ponies.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh! Y-yes, we're super sorry!
